main.description: A cheeseburger review. Authored and owned by the reviewer, stored on their own PDS. CB⚡DB indexes these records; it does not own them.

restaurant.description: Official name of the restaurant, e.g. 'Tulip Shop Tavern'.

location.description: Human-readable city and region as written by the reviewer, e.g. 'Portland, OR'.

geo.description: Optional coordinates supplied by the reviewer. Indexers may prefer their own geocoding.

rating.description: Editorial verdict. Closed set. legendary = Legendary, trip = Worth A Trip, solid = Solid, skip = Skip It. Never averaged: one reviewer's judgment stands as written.

price.description: Price tier for the burger as paid on the visit. Closed set. $ = under $11, $$ = $12–21, $$$ = $22 and up.

burger.description: The Burger. What's on it, what's made in-house, how it was cooked. Required: a review without the burger is not a review.

take.description: The Take. Why it earned the rating: value, sides, the visit. Required: a rating without reasoning is a score, not a review.

bskyPost.description: Optional. AT-URI of a Bluesky post crossposted from this review. Absent when the reviewer declined to crosspost. The review is canonical; the post is a share of it.

photo.description: Photo of the burger from that visit. Required: the record is the evidence.

photoAlt.description: Alt text describing the photo. Required: a photo nobody can read is half a review.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp of when the review was written.

geo.description: Coordinates, stored as strings per ATGeo convention (the atproto data model does not support floats).

latitude.description: Decimal degrees as a string, e.g. '45.5535'.

longitude.description: Decimal degrees as a string, e.g. '-122.6762'.

address.description: Structured postal address of the restaurant.
